title: Vacancy for Teacher at Great Learning

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Great Learning
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
